prestazioni: Engine: TVR Speed Six (S6) 4.0L inline-6, forged internals with Mahle Motorsport pistons (88.9mm bore, 105mm stroke), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft (balanced to 0.5g tolerance) for 9,000 RPM reliability. Compression ratio increased to 12.5:1 via custom JE piston domes and a fully CNC-ported cylinder head with oversized titanium intake valves (42mm) and sodium-filled exhaust valves (36mm), paired with Ferrea Competition valve springs and titanium retainers.

Forced Induction: Single Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold (equal-length, 1.75-inch primaries) and a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate (set to 2.2 bar peak boost). Intercooling via a custom air-to-water setup with a PWR 10-row core and a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump for consistent intake temps under 45°C. Fuel system upgraded to twin Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability and individual cylinder trims.

Drivetrain & Handling: Quaife ATB helical LSD with 45% preload, paired with a TVR-specific OS Giken 6-speed sequential gearbox (close-ratio, straight-cut gears) and a Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch. Suspension overhaul with Öhlins TTX40 coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 300lb/in springs front, 400lb/in rear) and polybushings from SuperPro (TVR-specific part numbers SPF1000K and SPF1001K). Braking via Alcon 6-piston monoblock calipers (380mm two-piece rotors front, 355mm rear) with Ferodo DS3000 pads and braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Aero: Custom carbon fiber Targa roof panel (removable, 30% weight reduction vs. OEM) with integrated NACA ducts for engine bay cooling. Front splitter and rear diffuser from TVR specialist RML Group, featuring active Gurney flaps (adjustable via cockpit switch) and a 3D-printed ABS underbody tray for optimized airflow. Side skirts and rear wing from the TVR Tuscan Speed Six GT2 program, modified for Sagaris Targa Evo dimensions (20% more downforce at 120mph).

Body & Lighting: Full carbon fiber body kit (hood, fenders, doors) from TVR Heritage’s ‘Project 7/12’ program, with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and exposed carbon weave accents. Lighting upgraded to Hella Rallye 3000 Super Whites (H3 bulbs) with custom CNC-machined aluminum bezels, and rear LED clusters from a TVR Cerbera Speed 12 (smoked lenses, sequential turn signals). Side mirrors replaced with carbon fiber units from a TVR Typhon (heated, electric-folding).

Interior & Wheels: Full Alcantara retrim by Trim Developments (UK), including dashboard, door cards, and Recaro SPG XL seats (carbon fiber shells, 6-point Schroth harnesses). Custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, Alcantara grip) with integrated Syvecs keypad for boost/traction control adjustments. Wheels: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x11 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35 front, 305/30 rear). Center-lock hubs from TVR’s GT3 program (single-nut, 72.6mm PCD).
